item.title: Warren Buffett’s No. 1 Rule Every Retiree Should Live By
item.description: Avoiding common investing mistakes and focusing on the long term can help you avoid losing money.

item.title: Warren Buffett’s 3 Rules for Protecting Your Retirement Savings After 50
item.description: His first rule is to never lose money. Here's how.

item.title: This Simple 24-Hour Rule Can Change How Retirees Spend
item.description: Impulse spending can take a bite out of your retirement savings.

item.title: Beyond Jewelry and Bars: Gold’s Industrial Applications
item.description: Gold is well-known for its use in jewelry and investing. But companies also rely on the precious metal for its industrial applications.

item.title: The Best and Worst Items to Buy in Bulk at the Grocery Store
item.description: Here are seven shopping tips to save you money.
